g.text: STALE: diverges from buffer pool frame
Frame stays warm — next read is cache HIT
DURABLE: survives power loss after fsync
1 — pwrite(): scatter 4096 bytes to disk offset
2 — fsync(): durability barrier — blocks until durable
3 — clear dirty bit and update telemetry
Path A — evict_lru(): on cache pressure
walk LRU list from tail toward head
remove frame from page_table and LRU list
frame is now free for incoming page
call write_page_to_disk() for each dirty frame
caller fsyncs once then deletes WAL journal
ssize_t n = pwrite(bp->fd, f->data, PAGE_SIZE, offset);

// Returns only when storage confirms NAND/platter write
